title: blumea sylvatica var. pachycephala
intro: Blumea sylvatica var. pachycephala, also known as the Chinese camomile or Asian camomile, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, relieving stress and anxiety, and promoting relaxation. Blumea sylvatica var. pachycephala can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular remedy in traditional Chinese medicine.
